name: fibre_gain
description: multiplicative stiffness gain produced by aligned fibres

name: fibre_fraction
description: area or volume fraction occupied by load-bearing fibres

name: orientation_deg
description: dominant fibre direction measured from the loading axis

name: concentration
description: orientation concentration parameter; larger means less dispersion

name: connectivity
description: dimensionless continuity of the fibre network

name: load_scale
description: multiplicative uncertainty in the applied macroscopic strain

name: boundary_compliance
description: loss of effective strain due to compliant grips or boundary error
